title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express

jsonLd.title: Walk-in Drive Logistics Manager at TCI Express
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at TCI Express. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Logistics Manager to strengthen our Navi Mumbai-based team.

About TCI Express:
TCI Express is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Ensure compliance with transportation regulations and safety standards
• Implement warehouse management systems (WMS) and track KPIs
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Optimize delivery routes to reduce cost and improve efficiency
• Manage reverse logistics and return merchandise authorization

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Sc / M.Sc in Life Sciences
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in KPI Monitoring
• Proficiency in Reverse Logistics
• Proficiency in Freight Forwarding
• Proficiency in INCOTERMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Navi Mumbai, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with TCI Express!
